title: Create: Alyane
description:
In this 1.20.1 [Fabric] modpack you can create and automate almost anything using the Create mod and its addons.

This modpack covers everything and optimizes the game with some small addons.

**| MK037**
body:
In this modpack you can automate almost every item in the game and at the same time you can also see the amazing landscape of the Tectonic Mod. This little modpack adds everything your heart desires and focuses mainly on the trains and their functions.

This modpack uses the Create Mod and its addons, allowing you to add your own tweaks to the by game simply adding them to the modpack.

The name "_Alyane_" stands for "_All ya need_"\
**|MK037**
